sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try moving LEFT 1 time to see if blocks align with HUD positions
# Current: green at 30, blue at 36, red at 42
# After LEFT: green at 26, blue at 32, red at 38
# HUD: red at 27, green at 33, blue at 39
# Not exact match, but let's try

print("Before LEFT:")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('R', 'b', 'N') and min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) < 50:
        r = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']}: ({r}, {c})")

action(['LEFT'])
print("\nAfter LEFT:")
seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg2['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('R', 'b', 'N') and min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) < 50:
        r = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']}: ({r}, {c})")
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
